```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Reflection", num: 8, title: "Seven-day reflection",
  purpose: "To look back gently and notice what you learned.",
  how: [There are no grades here — just a few honest words for each line.],
)
```

```{=typst}
#wcg-field("The most useful thing I noticed", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("A moment I felt calmer about a choice", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Something that surprised me", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("One thing I want to keep doing", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("One thing I want to let go of", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> Progress is not a straight line. A week of gentle noticing is real progress.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
